page_metadata.biotools__summary: Simulation of phenotype / genotype data under assortative mating. Includes functions for generating Bahadur order-2 multivariate Bernoulli variables with general and diagonal-plus-low-rank correlation structures.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Simulation of phenotype / genotype data under assortative mating. Includes functions for generating Bahadur order-2 multivariate Bernoulli variables with general and diagonal-plus-low-rank correlation structures.
